category_sources: source_facts.description says it indexes conda channels using rattler; official rattler repository is for Rust crates in the Conda ecosystem.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.repo points to conda/rattler; rattler_index crate docs describe indexing packages to create repodata.json files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/conda/rattler, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies conda channel indexing; rattler_index docs describe creating repodata.json files.
